title: DarkenedElytra
description: This pack makes the Elytra look sleek and dark, giving a modern and minimalist appearance. It is purely cosmetic and works with the vanilla Elytra.
body:
##  DarkenedElytra

## Description
**DarkenedElytra** transforms the standard Elytra into a sleek, minimalist dark-themed version.  
Designed for players who prefer subtle, stylish visuals, this pack gives the Elytra a modern and PvP-friendly appearance without changing its functionality.

Perfect for long sessions, night builds, or PvP gameplay where a low-distraction aesthetic is preferred.
